description: ARIS Trade & Production — Trade flows, market prices, livestock census, production records

targets.rawSql:
SELECT tf.origin_country AS origin,
       tf.destination_country AS destination,
       COUNT(*) AS flows,
       SUM(tf.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM trade_sps.trade_flows tf
WHERE ($country = 'ALL' OR tf.origin_country = $country OR tf.destination_country = $country)
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM tf.created_at) = $year
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR tf.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY tf.origin_country, tf.destination_country
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', mp.price_date) AS time,
       mp.commodity,
       AVG(mp.price) AS avg_price
FROM trade_sps.market_prices mp
WHERE ($country = 'ALL' OR mp.country_code = $country)
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM mp.price_date) = $year
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR mp.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY 1, mp.commodity
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT lc.species_name AS species,
       SUM(lc.head_count) AS total_heads
FROM livestock_prod.livestock_census lc
WHERE ($country = 'ALL' OR lc.country_code = $country)
  AND ($species = 'ALL' OR lc.species_name = $species)
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM lc.census_date) = $year
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR lc.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY lc.species_name
ORDER BY total_heads DESC;

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', pr.production_date) AS time,
       pr.product_type,
       SUM(pr.quantity) AS total_qty
FROM livestock_prod.production_records pr
WHERE ($country = 'ALL' OR pr.country_code = $country)
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM pr.production_date) = $year
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR pr.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY 1, pr.product_type
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS certificates
FROM trade_sps.sps_certificates sc
WHERE ($country = 'ALL' OR sc.country_code = $country)
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM sc.issued_date) = $year
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR sc.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}));

SELECT ROUND(SUM(fc.quantity_tonnes)::numeric, 0) AS tonnes
FROM fisheries.fishery_captures fc
WHERE ($country = 'ALL' OR fc.country_code = $country)
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fc.capture_date) = $year
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR fc.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}));

list.name: tenant_id
list.label: Tenant
list.description: Tenant ID filter injected by ARIS proxy

list.name: country
list.query: SELECT 'ALL' AS __value, 'All Countries' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT code AS __value, code AS __text FROM governance.countries WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY 2;

list.name: species
list.query: SELECT 'ALL' AS __value, 'All Species' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT species_name AS __value, species_name AS __text FROM livestock_prod.livestock_census ORDER BY 2;

title: ARIS Trade & Production
